inputs.name: SK.seed
inputs.description: n-byte secret seed from SLH-DSA private key

inputs.name: PK.seed
inputs.description: n-byte public seed from SLH-DSA public key

inputs.name: ADRS
inputs.description: 32-byte address structure, type set to FORS_TREE with layer=0, tree address, and key pair address set

inputs.name: idx
inputs.description: Index of the FORS secret value within the FORS private key
